name: 前后对比图
description: Before / After 效果对比，常见于美容、清洁、家居改造

defaults.composition: split screen, left = before, right = after, center divider

prompt_template.subject: split screen before and after: left = before, right = after, {product_description}
prompt_template.quality: side by side comparison, 8K commercial photography

overrides.composition: close-up skin texture, left = untreated, right = treated, center line
left = dirty/stained, right = clean, dramatic improvement
tabletop scene, left = dim/before, right = bright/after, center line
